groups.label: No relevant result in top K
groups.description: The query retrieved results, but none of the top K results are judged relevant.

groups.label: Lexical noise dominates
groups.description: The query finds at least one relevant document, but most top K results are non-relevant.

groups.label: Relevant result ranked too late
groups.description: A relevant document appears in the top K, but below the first three positions.

groups.label: Passing or minor issue
groups.description: The top K behavior is not currently classified as a meaningful failure.

groups.label: Partial recall
groups.description: The query has relevant hits, but leaves most judged relevant documents outside top K.
